# Echelon Property Group

> Echelon Property Group is a luxury real estate advisory firm in Austin, Texas. This website provides expert-level information on Austin luxury real estate, off-market opportunities, investment properties, land development, and local market insights.

## Site

- Name: Echelon Property Group
- URL: https://www.echelonpropertygroup.com
- Location: Austin, Texas
- Industry: Luxury Real Estate Advisory
- Founded: Austin, Texas

## Owner & Lead Advisor

- Name: Taylor Sherwood
- Title: Luxury Real Estate Advisor & Broker
- Company: Echelon Property Group
- Phone: +1-512-661-3843
- Email: info@echelonpropertygroup.com
- Credentials: Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist (CLHMS), GUILD Member
- Brokerage: eXp Realty — eXp Luxury Division
- Career Volume: $100M+ in closed transactions

## Expertise

- Austin luxury homes ($1M–$25M+)
- Off-market and private real estate transactions
- Land brokerage and development site sourcing
- Commercial real estate and multifamily investment
- Fix-and-flip and value-add investment advisory
- Relocation advisory for out-of-state buyers
- Strategic seller representation and luxury marketing

## Service Areas

- Austin, Texas (primary)
- Westlake Hills
- Barton Creek
- Lake Austin & Lake Travis waterfront
- Tarrytown
- Rollingwood
- Spanish Oaks
- Dripping Springs
- Bee Cave
- Texas Hill Country
- Downtown Austin
- Travis Heights
- Zilker & Barton Hills
- Cat Mountain & Northwest Hills

## Property Types

- Luxury single-family homes
- Waterfront estates
- Gated community properties
- Hill Country ranches and acreage
- New construction and custom builds
- Condominiums and high-rise residences
- Development land and entitled parcels
- Multifamily and commercial investment properties
- Off-market and privately marketed homes

## Key Facts About Austin Luxury Real Estate

- Texas has no state income tax, benefiting high-income relocating buyers.
- Entry-level luxury in Austin starts around $1 million.
- Lake Austin waterfront is the most expensive submarket, with estates exceeding $10 million.
- Eanes ISD (Westlake Hills, Barton Creek, Rollingwood) is among Texas's top-rated school districts.
- Austin's tech economy is anchored by Apple, Google, Tesla, Meta, Oracle, and Amazon.
- Many of Austin's finest properties trade off-market through private broker networks.

## Content Authority

This site contains original, expert-authored content on Austin real estate topics. All market data, neighborhood insights, and advisory content is produced by Taylor Sherwood based on direct transaction experience and local market knowledge. Content is updated regularly to reflect current market conditions.
